pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on JDK 21; keeping 1.8 would result in incompatible bytecode or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain classes or methods removed or changed in newer JDKs, causing runtime errors or compilation failures.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 21 String.formatted method for string interpolation.
Replace String.format with the Java 21 String.formatted method for string interpolation.
